output.not_legal_advice: Not legal or compliance advice. eBAM flow validation requires review by qualified treasury operations staff and the account servicer.
output.pii_note: ZERO PII: message type codes, sequence numbers, account identifiers (synthetic/structural), and state machine fields only. No account holder, signatory, or personal data enters this kernel.
output.regulatory_basis: CGI-MP eBAM Usage Guide 2023: acmt.007 AccountOpeningRequest / acmt.010 AccountRequestAcknowledgement / acmt.011 AccountModificationRequest / acmt.017 AccountClosureRequest / acmt.019 AccountReport state-machine. Each REQUEST must be followed by an ACK (acmt.010); REPORT (acmt.019) is permitted at any point. Gated chain routes on /acmt_state.
output.table_source: CGI-MP eBAM Usage Guide 2023 v1.0; ISO 20022 acmt message catalogue (acmt.007.001.06 / acmt.010.001.04 / acmt.011.001.07 / acmt.017.001.05 / acmt.019.001.07); SWIFT eBAM SLA guidelines 2023
